summary: Fixed Android build error: 'Dependency flutter_local_notifications requires core library desugaring to be enabled'. Updated android/app/build.gradle.kts to add isCoreLibraryDesugaringEnabled=true in compileOptions and added coreLibraryDesugaring('com.android.tools:desugar_jdk_libs:2.1.4') to dependencies block. This is required because flutter_local_notifications uses Java 8 time APIs.
current_status: Two build errors fixed: (1) notification_service.dart API calls updated to flutter_local_notifications v22 named params, (2) Android core library desugaring enabled. App should now build and run successfully.
